---
title: "Car Reservation - Narita to Hotel East 21 - Klook"
author: "DJG"
date: "10/13/25"
image: klook.png
categories: [car service]
lightbox: true
format:
  html:
    theme: lux
    toc: true
---

[Link to Reservation](c12685b-4457.pdf "Car from Narita to Hotel 21 East")

## Booking Overview

**Service:** Airport Pick-up\
**Flight:** KE711 (Korean Air)\
**Route:** Narita International Airport (NRT) → Hotel East 21 Tokyo\
**Hotel Address:** 6-3-3 Toyo, Koto-ku, Tokyo, Japan\
**Passengers:** 2

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Service Provider

**Company:** CHINICHI CO LTD - Popular Choice\
**Phone:** +86-18795849238\
**Email:** 1084963456\@qq.com

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Vehicle Information

**Type:** Toyota Camry / Volkswagen Passat or similar\
**Capacity:** - Max. Passengers: 4 - Max. Luggage: 2 pieces (standard size)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Pick-Up Details

### Flight Tracking

✅ **Driver will track your flight and pick you up when it lands**\
✅ **Free waiting time: 90 minutes from actual landing time**

### Extra Services Purchased

-   ✅ Meet & Greet (x1)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Meet-Up Instructions

### You Have Meet & Greet Service

**What This Means:** - Staff will wait for you with a sign showing your name - Look for them near the big screen at Exit B of Arrival Hall - They will be holding a name sign

### Terminal-Specific Instructions

#### Terminal 1 Arrival Hall

**Meet-up location:** Near Gate 2, Exit B\
**Look for:** Staff with name sign near big screen at Exit B

#### Terminal 2 Arrival Hall

**Meet-up location:** Near Gate N2, Exit B\
**Look for:** Staff with name sign near big screen at Exit B

#### Terminal 3 Arrival Hall

**Meet-up location:** Exit B\
**Special note:** If at Terminal 3, staff will meet you at Exit B, then you may need to take shuttle to Terminal 2

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Important Reminders

### Before Arrival

-   [ ] **Save driver phone number:** +86-18795849238
-   [ ] **Allow friend requests** in messenger apps (driver may contact you)
-   [ ] **Check your flight status** for any delays
-   [ ] **If flight delayed:** Email driver to confirm availability (overtime charges may apply)

### At Airport

1.  **Clear customs and immigration**
2.  **Collect luggage**
3.  **Exit at Arrival Hall Exit B**
4.  **Look for staff holding sign with your name**
5.  **Follow staff to vehicle**

### Emergency Contact

If you can't find the driver or have issues: - **Call:** +86-18795849238 - **Email:** 1084963456\@qq.com

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Luggage Policy

### Standard Luggage Sizing

-   **24-inch suitcase** = 1 standard piece
-   **25-28 inch suitcase** = 2 standard pieces
-   **Over 28 inches** = 3 standard pieces

### Special Items

Each counts as 1 extra large piece: - Wheelchairs - Strollers - Surfboards - Golf equipment

### Your Booking

-   **Maximum allowed:** 2 standard pieces
-   **Important:** If you exceed capacity, driver may refuse service with no refund

### Check Before Departure

-   [ ] Count your luggage pieces
-   [ ] Measure large suitcases if unsure
-   [ ] Contact provider if you think you'll exceed limit

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Cancellation Policy

**Free cancellation:** Up to 24 hours before pick-up time

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Travel Route Reference

### From Narita to Hotel East 21

**Distance:** \~60-70 km\
**Estimated Time:** 60-90 minutes (depending on traffic)\
**Route:** Narita → Tokyo Bay area → Koto-ku

**Traffic Notes:** - Evening rush hour (5-7pm): Expect delays - Weekends: Usually lighter traffic - Allow extra time if tight connection to other plans

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Arrival Day Checklist

### In Flight

-   [ ] Fill out customs/immigration forms if required
-   [ ] Have passport ready
-   [ ] Review meet-up instructions above

### Upon Landing

-   [ ] Turn on phone / remove airplane mode
-   [ ] Check for any messages from driver
-   [ ] Note which terminal you're in
-   [ ] Follow signs to baggage claim

### At Baggage Claim

-   [ ] Collect all luggage
-   [ ] Verify luggage count (2 pieces max for booking)
-   [ ] Proceed to Exit B of Arrival Hall

### At Meet-Up Point

-   [ ] Look for staff with name sign at Exit B near big screen
-   [ ] Have booking confirmation ready (this document or email)
-   [ ] Verify driver/staff identity
-   [ ] Confirm destination: Hotel East 21 Tokyo

### In Vehicle

-   [ ] Confirm hotel address: 6-3-3 Toyo, Koto-ku, Tokyo
-   [ ] Relax and enjoy the drive!
-   [ ] Optional: Use time to orient yourself with Tokyo via window

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Useful Information

### Communication

**If Staff Don't Speak English:** - Show this document or booking confirmation - Show hotel address: 6-3-3 Toyo, Koto-ku, Tokyo - Use Google Translate if needed - Point to "Hotel East 21" on phone/map

### Payment

-   Service should be **pre-paid**
-   No payment needed at pick-up unless:
    -   Flight delay causes overtime charges
    -   You added extra services not in booking

### Tipping

-   Not required in Japan
-   Small tip (¥500-1,000) appreciated but not expected

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## What to Have Ready

### Physical Items

-   Passport
-   This booking confirmation (print or on phone)
-   Hotel address written down (backup)
-   Driver contact info saved in phone

### On Your Phone

-   Driver's phone number: +86-18795849238
-   Hotel address in English and Japanese:
    -   English: Hotel East 21 Tokyo, 6-3-3 Toyo, Koto-ku, Tokyo
    -   Japanese: ホテルイースト21東京、東京都江東区東陽6-3-3
-   Google Maps with hotel location saved
-   WhatsApp/messenger apps (allow friend requests)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Backup Plan

### If You Can't Find Driver

1.  **Call driver immediately:** +86-18795849238
2.  **Describe your exact location** at airport
3.  **Wait at designated meet-up point** (Exit B, big screen area)
4.  **Allow 5-10 minutes** for driver to reach you

### If Driver Doesn't Answer

1.  **Email:** 1084963456\@qq.com
2.  **Take alternative transport** to hotel if necessary:
    -   Narita Express train to Tokyo Station → taxi to hotel
    -   Keisei Skyliner to Ueno → taxi to hotel
    -   Airport limousine bus (check if goes to Koto area)
3.  **Save receipts** for potential reimbursement claim

### Hotel Contact

Have Hotel East 21 contact info ready: - They can help communicate with driver if needed - Can confirm you're expected guest

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Notes

**Confirmation Number:** \[Add if you have one\]\
**Booking Date:** \[Add when you booked\]\
**Total Cost:** \[Add if you want to track\]

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Safe travels! See you in Tokyo! 🇯🇵**
